commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=46d3560801ea381854e4b19a0a471051439b1a15)
commands.review_summary:
The branch routes diff snapshot writes through atomic storage, treats corrupt diff and approval-index JSON as missing state, adds an exclusive approval-index writer, regression tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main rethrows SyntaxError for corrupt diff snapshots and approval indexes before the state can recover. I did not run a live current-main reproduction because this review is read-only and tests would create artifacts.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof and a maintainer compatibility decision on the hard-link create path; this is not a safe repair lane while the main blocker is contributor-owned proof.

target.title: fix: harden diff and approval state writes
target.body:
## Summary
- harden approval index persistence with an atomic exclusive create path
- treat corrupt approval index and diff state JSON as expired/missing state instead of crashing
- add regression coverage for approval index races/corruption and SDK diff state corruption

Fixes #112.
Fixes #113.

## Validation
- `pnpm --config.minimum-release-age=0 run format`
- `pnpm --config.minimum-release-age=0 run test`
- `pnpm --config.minimum-release-age=0 run build && node --test dist/test/state.test.js dist/test/approval_id.test.js --test-name-pattern 'corrupt|approval index writes never overwrite|writeFileAtomicExclusive'`

## Proof
Targeted behavior proof for the review findings:

```text
✔ approval index writes never overwrite an existing approval ID mapping
✔ corrupt approval index is treated as expired instead of crashing (#113)
✔ writeFileAtomicExclusive creates private files without replacing existing targets
✔ diffAndStore treats corrupt previous state as a miss and rewrites atomically (#112)
✔ SDK diff primitives treat corrupt previous state as a miss (#112)
```

The exclusive create path is covered by the no-overwrite/private-file regression above. It uses Node's exclusive file creation semantics and does not replace an existing target.
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: TurboTheTurtle
